# ConduitScore

> AI Visibility Score Scanner - Check how AI agents see your website

ConduitScore is a SaaS tool that scans websites and produces an AI visibility score (0-100) measuring how well AI agents like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini can discover, read, and cite the website content.

## What ConduitScore Does

- Scans any URL and returns an AI visibility score across 7 categories
- Checks crawler access (robots.txt rules for GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, etc.)
- Detects structured data (JSON-LD, schema.org markup)
- Analyzes content structure (heading hierarchy, semantic HTML)
- Validates LLMs.txt presence and configuration
- Evaluates technical health (meta tags, load times, Open Graph)
- Measures citation signals (external links, authority indicators)
- Assesses content quality (word count, freshness, readability)
- Provides copy-paste code fixes for every issue found

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://conduitscore.com/): Free AI visibility scanner - enter any URL
- [Pricing](https://conduitscore.com/pricing): Plans from free to $499/month
- [Blog](https://conduitscore.com/blog): Guides on AI SEO, GEO, and AEO
- [Dashboard](https://conduitscore.com/dashboard): Scan history and monitoring (authenticated)

## Pricing

- Free: 3 scans/month, no sign-up required
- Starter ($29/month): 50 scans, dashboard access, email alerts
- Pro ($199/month): 500 scans, site-wide crawling, competitor tracking, PDF reports
- Agency ($499/month): Unlimited scans, REST API, white-label branding

## Topics Covered

- AI SEO (Search Engine Optimization for AI agents)
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- AI crawler access and robots.txt configuration
- Structured data and JSON-LD for AI readability
- LLMs.txt standard and implementation
- Content optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini
- AI visibility scoring and benchmarking

- Website: https://conduitscore.com
- Email: support@conduitscore.com
